description.ko: 생물학적 진화와 하드웨어 통합의 섬세한 융합으로, 데이터를 꽃피우는 식물을 시각화했습니다.
description.en: A delicate fusion of biological evolution and hardware integration, visualizing a flower that blooms data.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Petal Processor.' A futuristic botanical form with translucent #FFB6C1 pink petals embedded with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins. Rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil composed of silicon shards. Shimmering digital pollen floats like glowing pixels in an ethereal atmosphere. Macro photography focus on the intersection of biological growth and hardware integration. Unreal Engine 5 style, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution.
